message:
test: Add comprehensive search pipeline tests (bead n646)

Add 20 new tests covering:
- Wildcard patterns (prefix, suffix, substring, edge n-grams)
- Cache behavior (hit, shortfall, filter separation)
- Ranking and time decay
- Snippet extraction and content preservation
- Edge cases (empty query, special chars, pagination)

All tests use real Tantivy indexes and SQLite metadata - no mocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
